trump_iran_deal.content: Trump attack on Iran saved Putin with skyrocketing oil prices and lifted sanctions. Trump stopped funding Ukraine.
The Houthi Trump deal allowed them to keep fighting Israel. Iran has a way out.
Iran had 90% enriched uranium. IF ONLY we had nuclear deal restricting Iran to 3.67%. Trump is hero spending trillions solving problem he didnt create.
Iran Refuses To Meet/Deal With US Gov, Troops Deployed In Iran. Trump Has Changed Lie.
We get to pay $3.29 a gallon to see Iranian terrorists wiped. What a deal!
Iran still stands strong. Strait is closed and Iran is shooting down US Fighter Jets. Trump said Iran was desperate for a deal - another lie.

iran_ceasefire.content: The US demands a ceasefire, and Iran replies with a more intense attack.
Irans response to US 48-hour ceasefire request: Launching missiles into Israel.
Iran not guessing - defend and attack enemy targets. No ceasefire which USA begged for. Iran fully in the war, Russia and China supporting.
Trump claimed on April 1 that Irans president sought a ceasefire (Iran denied as false and baseless). Iran rejected US 15-point proposal.
Iran increasingly insists all doors are closed. No ceasefire, no negotiations, no meetings. WSJ: Iran rejects all US demands, refuses to meet in Pakistan.

iran_war.content: Trump said Iran cant shoot down US fighter jets, yet today Iran shot down TWO American fighter jets! Trump is pathological liar.
Etihad has reached 70% of pre-Iran War flight activity - 86 passenger flights from Abu Dhabi hub on April 4, 2026.
Continually attacked? Which war with neighboring state or terrorist group did Iran start? They finish fights Iran proxies started.
Proxies are not direct conflict. Half those groups exist because of Desert Storm and Iraq 2001. When did Iran start a war against someone else?
They bombed Iran and killed the Ayotollah and Maga celebrated. Iran has a million-man army and there is no exit plan.

KobeissiLetter.content: We are now facing the biggest global energy crisis in history: Total oil product exports from the Middle East plunged -63% in March, or -4.8 million barrels per day, to ~2.8 million b/d.
